title: API gateway returning intermittent 502 errors
description: Users report failed requests from EU region between 09:00 and 09:20 UTC.

title: Nightly billing export completed with missing records
description: Reconciliation found 17 tenants missing from export batch OC-BILL-2026-06-30.

title: Background worker CPU saturation on node oc-worker-02
description: CPU has remained above 92 percent for 15 minutes after deployment 2026.06.29.4.

title: Delayed webhook delivery for customer notifications
description: Outbound queue latency peaked at 11 minutes; retries recovered most deliveries.

title: Object storage read timeout on attachment preview
description: Attachment previews intermittently timeout when reading larger PDF files.

title: Search index lag after schema optimization
description: Index freshness SLA exceeded by 4 minutes after rolling maintenance.

title: Scheduled report generation failed for Operations weekly digest
description: Digest report job threw a template parsing exception on tenant-specific section.
